creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Matthew, I've committed your LICENSE fix, thanks! There's no need to 
indicate that the port needs GCC unless that's confirmed by upstream, 
but if we leave it as it is it'll still get flagged on appropriate 
exp-runs so it'll have interest for fixing. Otherwise it'll stay 
GCC-only forever!
